title: Fossils & Archaeology Bushy Leaves
description: This is a texture pack that makes the F&A leaves bushy/3D Idea given to by @Fern_AW
body: Bushy leaf resource packs are great for making your shrubs a bit more realistic so it's annoying when theres none for your favorite mods! So **this resource pack adds 3D models to the Fossils and Archaeology leaves** to help add a bit more atmosphere to your builds enjoy!![All five different leaf variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f220960bbc6e0e08d0dc38c93829e3c5f62e0dd_0.webp)
